zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Denebaud於1414年5月出生在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治時，她的父親John Denebaud27歲，母親Florence Archdeacon22歲。她於1432年之前與Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton在英國薩默塞特結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1497年11月17日在英國維爾爾李享年83歲，埋葬在英國薩默塞特韓丁 聖 喬治。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Denebaud was born in May 1414, in Hinton St George, Somerset, England, her father, John Denebaud, was 27 and her mother, Florence Archdeacon, was 22. She married Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton before 1432, in Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 4 daughters. She died on 17 November 1497, in Leigh, Wiltshire, England, at the age of 83, and was buried in Hinton St George, Somerset, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Denebaud est née en mai 1414, à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, John Denebaud, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Florence Archdeacon, avait 22 ans. Elle a épousé Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton avant 1432, à Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 17 novembre 1497, à Leigh, Wiltshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 83 ans, et a été enterrée à Hinton St George, Somerset, Angleterre.

de.Hinton St George, Somerset, England, Gre: Hinton St George, Somerset, England, United Kingdom

Sie hat vor 1432 in Somerset, England Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 17. November 1497 im Alter von 83 Jahren in Leigh, Wiltshire, England und wurde in Hinton St George, Somerset, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Denebaud è nata il nel maggio 1414 nel Hinton St George, Somerset, England, sua padre, John Denebaud, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Florence Archdeacon, aveva 22 anni. Lei sposato Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton prima del 1432, nel Somerset, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 4 figlie. Morì il 17 novembre 1497, nel Leigh, Wiltshire, England, all'età di 83 anni, e fu sepolta a Hinton St George, Somerset, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Denebaudが1414年5月にイギリスソメルセトヒントン スト ジョーッジで生まれた時，父John Denebaudは27歳，母Florence Archdeaconは22歳であった。1432年以前にイギリスソメルセトでSir William Paulet Lord of Hintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1497年11月17日にイギリスウィルトシュアイアレイグで83歳で死去し，イギリスソメルセトヒントン スト ジョーッジにて埋葬された。

ko.Hinton St George, Somerset, England, Gre: 영국 잉글랜드 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Denebaud(이)가 1414년 5월 영국 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Denebaud(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Florence Archdeacon(은)는 22세였다. 그녀는 1432년 이전 영국 서머세트에서 Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1497년 11월 17일 영국 윌츠히르 리에서 83세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 서머세트 인턴 스트 조지에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Denebaud nasceu em maio de 1414, em Hinton St George, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, John Denebaud, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Florence Archdeacon, tinha 22 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton antes 1432, em Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 4 filhas. ru.Hinton St George, Somerset, England, Gre: хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Denebaud родилась май 1414 г. в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени John Denebaud было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Florence Archdeacon, 22. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir William Paulet Lord of Hinton перед 1432 г. в местности сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 4 дочери. Она умерла 17 ноября 1497 г. в местности лиг, уилцхир, Англия в возрасте 83 лет и была похоронена в местности хинтон ст джеордж, сомирсет, Англия.
